home.heroTitle: MinLish - Learn English effectively through Dictation & Shadowing
home.heroDesc: A modern learning platform for young people. Improve your listening and speaking skills naturally through proven methods, in a minimalist and focused environment.
home.featuresSubtitle: Three key pillars to master the language.
home.dictationDesc: Practice listening and writing dictation with real-life conversations. Improve your sound recognition and vocabulary.
home.shadowingDesc: Mimic the intonation and pronunciation of native speakers. The perfect method for a natural and confident tone.
home.flashcardsDesc: Long-term vocabulary memorization through Spaced Repetition system.
home.whyDesc: Designed based on academic cognitive principles, MinLish provides a premium, distraction-free learning experience.
home.whyMethodDesc: Focus on quality over quantity. The system automatically analyzes weaknesses and recommends suitable exercises.
home.whyProgressDesc: Track your daily progress through visual charts, helping you stay motivated.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to level up your English?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of other learners improving their skills daily with our premium learning platform.
